rss.title: Fires Tear Through Nebraska Grasslands
rss.snippet: Dry, warm, and windy conditions across the U.S. Great Plains led to extreme fire activity in March 2026.

rss.title: Seeing Blue During Schirmacher’s Summer Melt Season
rss.snippet: A network of meltwater lakes and drainage channels made an Antarctic ice shelf known for its blue ice areas even bluer.

github_repos.snippet: Cosmos Journeyer is a space exploration game running directly in the browser! Take your spaceship and witness the beauty of this virtually infinite universe.

arxiv_papers.title: Exoplanet Search and Characterization with the Proposed POET Canadian Space Mission
arxiv_papers.snippet: The Photometric Observations of Exoplanet Transits (POET) is a proposed micro-satellite mission dedicated to the characterization and discovery of transiting exoplanets. arxiv_papers.snippet: The Laser Interferometer Space Antenna (LISA) will enable precision studies of Extreme and Intermediate Mass Ratio Inspirals (EMRIs/IMRIs), providing unique probes of astrophysical environments of galactic nuclei and strong-field gravity.
